summary: 1 artifact found: broken word at start of file (Fhoặc). Possibly also truncated first sentence.

findings.source_excerpt: For the second time in that day, the thing that had once been Professor Quirrell was walking through the halls of Hogwarts.
findings.target_excerpt: Fhoặc lần thứ hai trong ngày đó, thứ từng là Giáo sư Quirrell đang đi bộ qua hành lang của Hogwarts.
findings.note: Line 1 starts with 'Fhoặc' - broken/mangled word likely from OCR or MT failure on 'For'. The rest of the sentence is correctly translated.
